title: On Rigid 2-Step Nilpotent Lie Algebras
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Lt
abstract: In this note we consider 2-step nilpotent Lie algebras and give a criterion for the rigidity of this class in the variety [Formula: see text] of 2-step nilpotent Lie algebras of dimension n. We apply this criterion to prove that every rigid Lie algebra in [Formula: see text] is indecomposable, except for [Formula: see text]3 ⊕ ℂ and [Formula: see text]3 ⊕ [Formula: see text]3.
